        task.spawn(function(...)

            local Tool = LocalPlayer.Character:FindFirstChildOfClass("Tool")

            local vu_2501 = Tool.Name

            local UnequipTools = LocalPlayer.Character:FindFirstChild("Humanoid"):UnequipTools()
            getconnections(LocalPlayer:WaitForChild("PlayerGui").Backpack.Bar:FindFirstChild("Slot1").MouseButton1Down)

            getconnections(LocalPlayer:WaitForChild("PlayerGui").Backpack.Bar:FindFirstChild("Slot1").Activated)
            getconnections(LocalPlayer:WaitForChild("PlayerGui").Backpack.Bar:FindFirstChild("Slot1").InputBegan)
